parameters.text:
=You are an expert SEO strategist. A user has submitted the following request:

- **Keyword / Topic:** {{ $json.body.keyword }}
- **Target Audience:** {{ $json.body.target_audience }}
- **Content Type:** {{ $json.body.content_type }}

Generate a detailed SEO Content Brief in valid JSON using this exact structure:
{
  "keyword": "<primary keyword>",
  "seo_title_suggestions": ["<title 1>", "<title 2>", "<title 3>"],
  "meta_description": "<150-160 character meta description>",
  "target_word_count": <number>,
  "search_intent": "<informational | transactional | navigational | commercial>",
  "secondary_keywords": ["<kw1>", "<kw2>", "<kw3>", "<kw4>", "<kw5>"],
  "lsi_keywords": ["<lsi1>", "<lsi2>", "<lsi3>"],
  "content_outline": [
    { "section": "Introduction", "notes": "<brief guidance>" },
    { "section": "<H2 heading>", "notes": "<brief guidance>" },
    { "section": "<H2 heading>", "notes": "<brief guidance>" },
    { "section": "<H2 heading>", "notes": "<brief guidance>" },
    { "section": "FAQs", "notes": "List 3 common questions and short answers" },
    { "section": "Conclusion", "notes": "<brief guidance>" }
  ],
  "internal_link_opportunities": ["<topic 1>", "<topic 2>"],
  "cta_suggestion": "<recommended call-to-action>"
}

Return ONLY the JSON object. No markdown, no explanation, no extra text.
